test.create_query: CREATE TABLE index_test_cast ( z UInt32, x UInt16 ALIAS mortonDecode(2, z).1, y UInt16 ALIAS mortonDecode(2, z).2, INDEX i_x (mortonDecode(2, z).1) TYPE minmax, INDEX i_y (mortonDecode(2, z).2) TYPE minmax ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY z
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO index_test_cast SELECT number * 5 FROM numbers_mt(toUInt64(0x100000000 / 5)) SETTINGS max_insert_threads=8
test.query: SELECT count() FROM index_test_cast WHERE x >= 20000 AND x <= 20100 AND y >= 10000 AND y <= 10100
